title: Modern 3-room apartment with sea view, Carmel
description: Brand-new 3-room apartment in a quiet street on the Carmel. Bright south-facing balcony overlooking the bay, modern open-plan kitchen, fitted wardrobes, and underground parking.

title: Renovated 2-room beach apartment, Bat Yam
description: Fully renovated 2-room apartment two blocks from the promenade. New kitchen, new bathroom, and an open living area opening to a sunny balcony with a partial sea view.

title: Spacious family house, Hod HaSharon
description: Detached family house in a quiet residential street. Five rooms on two levels, large private garden with a wooden deck, covered parking for two cars, and a separate utility room.

title: Penthouse with rooftop terrace, Florentin
description: Stylish 4-room penthouse in the heart of Florentin. Private rooftop terrace with 360° city views, designer kitchen, exposed concrete finishes, and a top-floor location with elevator access.

title: Garden apartment near the park, Ramat Gan
description: Ground-floor 4-room garden apartment overlooking the National Park. Private 60 sqm garden, two covered parking spots, and direct access to the building's storage area.

title: Luxury villa with pool, Caesarea
description: Architect-designed 6-room villa in the Golf neighborhood. Heated swimming pool, landscaped 700 sqm garden, smart-home automation, separate guest unit, and partial sea views from the upper floor.

title: Compact studio on Rothschild Boulevard
description: Efficient 1-room studio on a Bauhaus-era building along Rothschild. French balcony facing the boulevard, well-maintained common areas, and walking distance to cafes and the beach.

title: 3-room apartment, needs renovation, Nachlaot
description: Authentic 3-room apartment in a historic Nachlaot building. High ceilings, original floor tiles, and a small balcony — full kitchen and bathroom renovation required, electrical system also dated.

title: Country villa with vineyard view, Zichron Yaakov
description: Stone-clad 5-room villa on a quiet street with vineyard views. Open living area with a wood-burning fireplace, mature garden with fruit trees, and covered parking for two vehicles.

title: Modern duplex in Herzliya Pituach
description: Two-floor 5-room duplex in a boutique building near the beach. Direct elevator access, two private parking spots, master suite with sea view, and 24/7 concierge service.

title: New 4-room apartment, Beersheba Ramot
description: Brand-new 4-room apartment in a new Ramot project. Includes underground parking, private storage, and a 12 sqm balcony. Close to schools, parks, and the new light rail line.

title: Family cottage, Buchman, Modiin
description: 4-room cottage on a quiet cul-de-sac in Buchman. Renovated kitchen, well-kept garden, covered parking, and a short walk to the local commercial center.

title: Seafront 4-room apartment, Netanya
description: Front-line 4-room apartment with unobstructed sea views from a large wraparound balcony. Doorman building with elevator, parking, and direct access to the cliff-top promenade.

title: Townhouse with garden, Raanana
description: 5-room townhouse arranged over three levels. Private rear garden, covered parking, attic playroom, and walking distance to Raanana Park and central schools.

title: Affordable 3-room apartment, Nahariya
description: 3-room apartment in central Nahariya. Functional kitchen and bathroom in average condition, balcony off the living room, and one parking spot. Cosmetic refresh recommended.

title: Grade A office, Azrieli Sarona Tower
description: Brand-new 220 sqm office on a high floor of the Sarona Tower. Open floor plan with two glass-walled meeting rooms, kitchenette, and four assigned parking spots in the building garage.

title: Storefront retail unit, Carmel Center
description: 75 sqm retail unit on a busy Carmel Center street. Two large display windows, rear service entrance, and a back-of-house storage room. Suited for fashion, cafe, or specialty retail.

title: Logistics warehouse near Ashdod Port
description: 1,200 sqm logistics warehouse 5 minutes from Ashdod Port. Two loading docks, 8m clear ceiling height, drive-in truck access, fenced yard, and a small office mezzanine.

title: Mid-size office, Kiryat Aryeh tech park
description: 160 sqm office in the Kiryat Aryeh tech park. Five separate rooms plus an open work area, two meeting rooms, kitchenette, and three reserved parking spots in the building.

title: Boutique retail unit, Mamilla Mall
description: 60 sqm boutique retail unit on the Mamilla pedestrian promenade. High tourist footfall, large display windows, and shared mall loading and waste management services.

title: Cold storage facility, Holon industrial zone
description: 800 sqm industrial property configured for cold storage. Two temperature-controlled rooms, loading dock, fenced perimeter, three-phase power, and a 40 sqm front office area.

title: Boutique office for startups, Herzliya Pituach
description: 120 sqm boutique office suited to a 10-15 person startup. Open work area, one meeting room, kitchenette and lounge, two parking spots, and dedicated fiber internet line.
